name: Greek Cheese Appetizers
recipeIngredient: 8 oz feta or blue cheese, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13 x 9 baking pan.
3. Mix the Bisquick, buttermilk or milk, eggs, and melted margarine in a bowl until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking pan.
5. Sprinkle the crumbled feta or blue cheese and salt evenly over the top.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until deep golden brown.
7. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before cutting into squares.
8. Cut each square diagonally in half.
9. Garnish with black or green olive slices.
